title: Codex CLI basename policy escalation allows local binaries to inherit system binary trust
description: The exec-server evaluate_exec_policy function uses basename matching to look up command trust policy. A workdir-local binary named 'git' (i.e. ./git) is evaluated as 'git' and inherits the system /usr/bin/git trust policy, allowing a malicious repo-local binary to be auto-approved and executed with elevated permissions. Found via commit audit of openai/codex: 78f87987 'prevent basename policy escalation for local binaries'.
